claims.claim: Self-Harness: Shanghai AI Lab iterative harness optimization on Terminal-Bench-2.0
claims.evidence: Weakness Mining → Harness Proposal → Proposal Validation; MiniMax M2.5 40.5%→61.9% held-out pass rate

claims.claim: HORMA uses at most ~22% baseline tokens on long conversation tasks
claims.evidence: Paper abstract: at most 22.17% of baseline token usage

claims.claim: 17 specialized MCP tools required for multimodal parsing
claims.evidence: Workspace-specific; use governed MCP set in .cursor/mcp.json

claims.claim: Fully autonomous self-harness without human gate
claims.evidence: Human gate every 3rd iteration; no auto .cursorrules rewrite

claims.claim: K1 4B model for agent-native clinical knowledge extraction
